rules.title: Absolute or superlative claim
rules.pattern: (国家级|最高级|最佳|第一|唯一|首个|顶级|极品|史上最强|全网第一|永久有效|100%有效|绝对)
rules.explanation: Absolute or superlative language often creates advertising law risk when it cannot be fully substantiated.
rules.suggestion: Replace with measurable, source-backed wording, such as scope, date range, or test conditions.

rules.title: Guaranteed outcome or certainty
rules.pattern: (包过|保证通过|无效退款|立刻见效|立即见效|治愈|根治|稳赚|保本|零风险|百分百成功)
rules.explanation: Guarantees about outcomes, returns, or treatment effects are a common source of enforcement risk.
rules.suggestion: Remove guaranteed language and use conditional or evidence-based descriptions only.

rules.title: Medical or treatment effect claim
rules.pattern: (修复视力|抗癌|降三高|消炎杀菌|治脱发|快速减肥|医学验证治好|改善近视|治疗效果)
rules.explanation: Medical-style efficacy claims can trigger higher-risk review, especially in healthcare, beauty, or supplement scenarios.
rules.suggestion: Use compliant product descriptions and require specialized review for medical or health-related promotions.

rules.title: Financial return promise
rules.pattern: (年化收益|高收益|稳赔?不赚|保本保收益|低风险高回报|稳赚不赔)
rules.explanation: Investment or finance copy that implies assured return or low/no risk has elevated compliance risk.
rules.suggestion: Remove return promises and add clear risk disclosures reviewed by compliance staff.

rules.title: Authority or endorsement risk
rules.pattern: (权威专家推荐|央视推荐|国家认证推荐|官方唯一推荐|院长亲荐|名医同款|博士团队背书)
rules.explanation: Authority endorsements are risky when identity, authorization, or evidence cannot be verified.
rules.suggestion: Use verifiable endorsements only, with documented authorization and context.

rules.title: Lowest-price or exclusivity claim
rules.pattern: (全网最低|最低价|底价|独家|仅此一家|别无分店|唯一渠道)
rules.explanation: Lowest-price or exclusivity claims are risky if they cannot be continuously verified.
rules.suggestion: Replace with specific time-bound offers or clearly documented campaign terms.

rules.title: Education or exam guarantee
rules.pattern: (包录取|包过|保过|签约保分|提分保证|保上岸)
rules.explanation: Education and exam advertising often draws enforcement when it promises admission or guaranteed score improvement.
rules.suggestion: Remove result guarantees and keep only objective course, teacher, and service descriptions.

rules.title: Artificial urgency or pressure wording
rules.pattern: (最后一天|马上恢复原价|错过再等一年|只剩最后[一二三四五六七八九十0-9]+份|今天不买就没了)
rules.explanation: Urgency language is not always unlawful, but it is worth reviewing when scarcity cannot be verified.
rules.suggestion: Keep urgency claims traceable to real inventory, timing, and campaign records.

rules.title: AI-generated persona or identity risk
rules.pattern: (AI医生|AI专家|AI院长|虚拟名医|仿真医生形象|AI生成主播)
rules.explanation: AI-generated experts or people in sensitive sectors can create deception and disclosure risk.
rules.suggestion: Disclose synthetic content clearly and avoid fictitious authority figures in sensitive promotions.

rules.title: Possible missing ad disclosure
rules.pattern: (合作推荐|种草|真实分享|亲测好用)
rules.explanation: Influencer-style or soft-selling copy may require clear ad or promotion disclosure depending on context.
rules.suggestion: Review whether the publishing channel requires an explicit advertising or commercial cooperation label.
